seoTitle: Goodlands vs Goomalling — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goodlands and Goomalling. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goodlands and Goomalling.
heading: Goodlands vs Goomalling — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goodlands, Western Australia and Goomalling, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goomalling has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Goodlands (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goodlands or Goomalling safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goodlands has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Goomalling scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goodlands scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Goomalling scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goodlands or Goomalling?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goomalling has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
